allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=12345 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql" -h localhost -U ElToke -d efrain -c "SELECT prosrc FROM pg_proc WHERE proname = 'fn_audit_trigger';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=12345 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql" -h localhost -p 5432 -U ElToke -d efrain -c "
SELECT c.relname AS tabla,
       CASE t.tgenabled WHEN 'O' THEN 'ACTIVO' WHEN 'D' THEN 'DESACTIVADO' END AS estado
FROM pg_trigger t
JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = t.tgrelid
JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
WHERE t.tgname = 'trg_audit' AND n.nspname = 'public'
ORDER BY estado, c.relname;
" 2>&1)
